case_title: MONTGOMERY RESOURCES INC. VS 900 CAPITAL SERVICES INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY MONTGOMERY RESOURCES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT 900 CAPITAL SERVICES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY RESOURCES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 900 CAPITAL SERVICES INC. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,050.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 900 CAPITAL SERVICES INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT 900 CAPITAL SERVICES INC.
